HGSS.574.0000:
Whitney: Hi! I’m Whitney!\f
...You!
I saw you at the Radio Tower just now.\f
Everyone was into Pokémon, so I got
into it, too!\f
Pokémon are super cute!\f
You want to battle?\r
I’m warning you--I’m good!\f
HGSS.574.0001:
Whitney: Sob...\f
...Waaaaaaah!
You’re mean!\f
You shouldn’t be so serious!
You...you child, you!
HGSS.574.0003:
Whitney: Sniff...\f
What? What do you want? A Badge?\f
Oh, right. I forgot.
Here’s the Plain Badge.\f
HGSS.574.0004:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Plain Badge from Whitney.
HGSS.574.0005:
Whitney: The Plain Badge lets your
Pokémon use Strength outside\r
of battle.\f
Oh, you can have this, too!\f
HGSS.574.0007:
Whitney: It’s Attract!
It makes full use of a Pokémon’s charm.\f
Isn’t it just perfect for a cutie
like me?\r
That’s right!\f
I heard that this thing called the
Pokéathlon Dome is now open right next\r
to the National Park.\f
You should go try it, since you’re
so good at battling with your Pokémon!
HGSS.574.0008:
Whitney: Ah, that was a good cry!\f
Come for a visit again! Bye-bye!
HGSS.574.0009:
Oh, no. You made Whitney cry.\f
It’s OK. She’ll stop soon.
She always cries when she loses.\f
HGSS.574.0010:
Yo! Champ in the making!\f
This Gym is home to Normal-type
Pokémon Trainers.\f
I recommend you use Fighting-type
Pokémon.
HGSS.574.0011:
You won? Great! I was busy admiring
the powerful Trainers here.
HGSS.574.0013:
Goldenrod City Pokémon Gym\f
Leader: Whitney
Certified Trainer!\r
[0103,0000,0000]
